office_does: The clerk maintains Superior Court records, receives filings and fees, supports courtroom administration, and manages lawful public access to records.
race_blurb: Dave Lucas emphasizes court-administration experience and continuity; Elliot Robison emphasizes technology, accessibility, workplace relations, and operational reporting.

candidates.summary: Cheney's municipal court administrator, Lucas presents direct court-management and military leadership experience as preparation for the clerk's office.
highlights: Serves as Cheney Municipal Court administrator and completed the state Court Administrators Academy [S1]
Proposes continued modernization with attention to speed, accuracy, and confidential information [S1]

experience.basis: He has direct court-administration experience, though not prior elected county-clerk service.

candidates.summary: A business-intelligence analyst, Robison proposes technology-driven workflow improvements and expanded public access tools.
highlights: Proposes expanded guides, notifications, translated forms, and public operational reporting [S1][S2]
Would apply capacity analysis and supports a union-friendly workplace [S1]

spending.basis: He proposes expanding public-facing tools and operational capabilities as the main route to improved service.

experience.basis: He offers relevant analytics and software experience but no direct court-administration record.
